rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (4/10) and rest on the same job-relevant reasoning: 15+ years of experience meeting the baseline, strong entrepreneurial/open-source background via GISCollective, but lacking deep recognized AI expertise, an advanced AI degree, and Director-level strategic advisory experience. The differences are purely cosmetic rewording and the use of the candidate's first name 'Bogdan', which is name surfacing rather than a penalty. Nothing in the variant keys off the India location change — no concern about the institutions, employers, or country is introduced, and the criticisms map one-to-one with the baseline.
